description: Chromium WebGPU integration overlay. The source selector markers now pass the check_chromium_source_checkout.py --require-runtime-selector gate under the Chromium lane env, including adapter-denylist detail emitted once adapter identity is available and active-Doe IOSurface shared texture import markers. The Doe Chromium proc-surface checker validates the direct browser-facing WGPU exports, the full Dawn wire proc table resolves through wgpuGetProcAddress, browser interop procs resolve through Doe-local mappings before native fallback, and forced-Doe selection injects a Doe-created WGPUInstance into the WebGPU wire server. Browser diagnostics now include a source-binary forced-Doe smoke artifact, but the overlay stays below chromium_runtime_active until promotion gates accept the capability rows as passing.

coverage.notes: Observed in source-binary browser diagnostics. Source-level forced-Doe wire ownership is landed, but this capability stays diagnostic until chromium_runtime_active promotion is accepted.
Observed in source-binary browser diagnostics. Source-level forced-Doe instance ownership is landed, but this capability stays diagnostic until chromium_runtime_active promotion is accepted.
Diagnostic coverage is source-binary evidence, but promotion waits on chromium_runtime_active acceptance.
Smoke coverage exercises WebGPU work through the source binary; promotion waits on chromium_runtime_active acceptance.
Render smoke output remains diagnostic until chromium_runtime_active promotion is accepted.
Canvas context evidence does not by itself prove Doe runtime ownership inside Chromium.
Readback behavior stays diagnostic until source-level runtime identity is present.
Copy readback coverage remains diagnostic until chromium_runtime_active promotion is accepted.
Diagnostic coverage is retained, but source status requires chromium_runtime_active promotion.
Upload coverage remains diagnostic until chromium_runtime_active promotion is accepted.
Queue completion behavior remains diagnostic pending chromium_runtime_active promotion.

Active Doe texture mailbox association imports macOS IOSurface shared texture memory through Doe and the current source-binary smoke exercises external copy coverage. Promotion still waits on chromium_runtime_active acceptance.
Active Doe now owns the IOSurface shared texture import path for texture mailboxes; browser-level external texture evidence remains diagnostic until chromium_runtime_active promotion.
Resource lifecycle evidence remains diagnostic without source-level Doe runtime identity.
Current source-binary browser smoke exercises timestampWrites and resolveQuerySet readback in both Dawn and forced-Doe modes; promotion remains blocked on chromium_runtime_active acceptance.
Current source-binary browser smoke exercises render-pass drawIndirect in both Dawn and forced-Doe modes; promotion remains blocked on chromium_runtime_active acceptance.

Current source-binary browser smoke exercises createRenderBundleEncoder, draw, finish, and executeBundles in both Dawn and forced-Doe modes; promotion remains blocked on chromium_runtime_active acceptance.

wireProtocolNotes.architecture: Current source checkout evidence shows WebGPUDecoderImpl runtime selector markers and passes the require-runtime-selector gate. Forced Doe now fails closed through typed load, runtime initialization, profile, proc-surface, wire-proc-table, and unknown-selection reasons. Adapter filtering emits adapter_denylist_detail with profile_denylisted, adapter identity fields, and the blocklist reason once adapter identity is available. The required direct proc surface covers browser-facing compute, render, queue, surface, and external texture WGPU exports; the full DawnProcTable surface resolves through wgpuGetProcAddress for the active wire server; required browser interop procs resolve through Doe-local mappings before native fallback.
wireProtocolNotes.instanceLifetime: Doe proc-surface load validation is handled in Chromium source and the Doe Chromium proc-surface checker validates the dylib export surface, create/release WGPUInstance bootstrap, wgpuGetProcAddress coverage for the generated DawnProcTable, Doe-local resolver coverage for required browser shared-memory and error-object procs, and implementation-source behavior for tagged Doe error objects plus macOS IOSurface shared texture import. Forced Doe injects a Doe-created WGPUInstance into the WebGPU wire server, imports active texture mailboxes through Doe IOSurface shared texture memory, and rejects active shared-buffer mailbox association until a real native buffer handle source is wired.
wireProtocolNotes.externalTextureGap: External texture browser exports are part of the forced-Doe proc-surface gate. Active Doe texture mailbox association now imports macOS IOSurface shared texture memory through the loaded Doe proc table, injects a raw Doe WGPUTexture into the wire server, and ends shared texture access during present teardown. Shared buffer memory and shared fences remain explicit unsupported until native handle sources exist.
